obtain ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hU⟩ := t
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq] at ht

      lift y to ℕ using hS.2.2.le
      lift x to ℕ using hS.2.1.le
      norm_cast at h
      rcases (Nat.dvd_prime hk.out).mp ⟨_, h.symm⟩ with rfl | rfl
      · rfl

        have : 4 * k + 1 > 0 := Nat.prime_pos hk.out
        have : 4 * x + (4 * k + 1) = 1 := Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_self_right this h
        linarith
    have : x = k := by
      have h : 4 * x * y + z ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := hS.1
      rw [‹z = y›, ‹y = 1›] at h
      linarith
    subst x y z
    rfl

    · ring

  · rintro rfl
    simp

rcases t with ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, ⟨h_eq, hx, hy⟩, h_U⟩
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq, secondInvo, secondInvo_fun] at ht
    have hyz : y = z := by linarith [ht.1]
    subst hyz
    have h_prime : Nat.Prime (4 * k + 1) := hk.out
    have h_mul : y * (4 * x + y) = 4 * k + 1 := by
      rw [← h_eq]
      ring
    lift y to ℕ using by linarith
    lift x to ℕ using by linarith
    norm_cast at h_mul
    have hyd : y ∣ 4 * k + 1 := Dvd.intro (4 * x + y) h_mul
    rcases (Nat.Prime.dvd_iff_one_or_self h_prime).mp hyd with rfl | rfl
    · have hxk : x = k := by linarith
      subst hxk
      rfl
    · have : 4 * x + (4 * k + 1) = 1 := by
        nth_rw 2 [← h_mul]
        refine Nat.mul_left_cancel (by positivity) rfl
      linarith
  · rintro rfl
    ext <;> simp [secondInvo, secondInvo_fun]

rcases t with ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hU⟩
    simp only [secondInvo, secondInvo_fun, Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq, true_and] at ht
    obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := ht
    have : z = y := by linarith
    subst z
    have h : y * (4 * x + y) = 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith [hS.1]
    lift y to ℕ using hS.2.2.le
    have : y ∣ 4 * k + 1 := ⟨4 * x + y, by norm_cast; rw [h]; ring⟩
    rcases (Nat.dvd_prime Fact.out).1 this with rfl | rfl
    · have : x = k := by norm_cast at h; linarith
      subst x
      rfl
    · have : 0 < x := hS.2.1
      have : 0 < k := k_pos k
      nlinarith
  · intro ht
    simp [ht]
    apply Subtype.eq
    apply Subtype.eq
    simp [secondInvo, secondInvo_fun]
    ring

obtain ⟨hx, -, hz⟩ := ht
    have : z = y := by linarith
    subst z
    have h_prime : Nat.Prime (4 * k + 1) := hk.out
    have h_eq : 4 * x * y + y * y = 4 * k + 1 := by convert hS.1 using 1; ring
    lift x to ℕ using (by linarith [hS.2.1])
    lift y to ℕ using (by linarith [hS.2.2])
    norm_cast at h_eq
    have h_factor : y * (4 * x + y) = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← h_eq]; ring
    rcases Nat.Prime.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd h_prime (Dvd.intro _ h_factor) with rfl | rfl
    · simp at h_factor
      have : x = k := by linarith
      subst x; simp
    · have : 4 * x + (4 * k + 1) = 1 := by
        apply Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_one_right
        rw [h_factor]; ring
      have : 1 < 4 * k + 1 := h_prime.one_lt
      linarith
  · rintro rfl
    simp [secondInvo, secondInvo_fun]

obtain ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hU⟩ := t
    apply Subtype.coe_injective at ht
    simp only [secondInvo, secondInvo_fun, Prod.mk.injEq] at ht
    have : y = z := by linarith
    subst z
    have h_eq : 4 * x * y + y ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := hS.1
    lift y to ℕ using (by linarith [hS.2.2])
    lift x to ℕ using (by linarith [hS.2.1])
    norm_cast at h_eq
    have : y ∣ 4 * k + 1 := ⟨4 * x + y, by rw [← h_eq]; ring⟩
    rcases (Nat.dvd_prime hk.out).mp this with rfl | rfl
    · have : x = k := by nlinarith
      subst x
      simp
    · have : 4 * x + (4 * k + 1) = 1 := by
        rw [h_eq]
        apply Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_self_right (by nlinarith)
        rfl
      have : 0 < k := k_pos k
      nlinarith
  · rintro rfl
    apply Subtype.coe_injective
    simp [secondInvo, secondInvo_fun]

obtain ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, h_eq, hx, hy⟩, h_U⟩ := t
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq, true_and] at ht
    obtain ⟨h1, -, h3⟩ := ht
    have : z = y := by linarith
    subst z
    simp only [S, mem_setOf_eq] at h_eq
    lift x to ℕ using hx
    lift y to ℕ using hy
    norm_cast at h_eq
    have h : y * (4 * x + y) = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← h_eq]; ring
    have hy1 : y = 1 := by
      rcases Nat.Prime.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd hk.out ⟨_, h.symm⟩ with rfl | rfl
      · rfl
      · exfalso
        rw [self_eq_mul_right (Nat.Prime.ne_zero hk.out)] at h
        linarith
    subst y
    have : x = k := by
      rw [one_mul] at h
      linarith
    subst x
    simp
  · rintro rfl
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq, true_and]
    dsimp [secondInvo_fun]
    ring

obtain ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hU⟩ := t
    simp only [secondInvo, secondInvo_fun, Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq, true_and] at ht
    have : y = z := by linarith
    subst z
    lift x to ℕ using hS.2.1.le
    lift y to ℕ using hS.2.2.le
    have h : y * (4 * x + y) = 4 * k + 1 := by
      apply Int.ofNat_inj.1
      push_cast
      rw [← hS.1]
      ring
    have h_dvd : y ∣ 4 * k + 1 := ⟨4 * x + y, h⟩
    rcases (Nat.Prime.dvd_iff_one_or_self Fact.out h_dvd).mp with rfl | rfl
    · simp at h
      have : x = k := by linarith
      subst x
      simp
    · exfalso
      have : 4 * x + (4 * k + 1) = 1 := by
        rw [← h]
        apply Nat.mul_left_cancel (by positivity)
        rfl
      have : k > 0 := k_pos k
      linarith
  · rintro rfl
    simp [secondInvo, secondInvo_fun]
    ring

obtain ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩, hU⟩ := t
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq, true_and] at ht
    have : y = z := by linarith
    subst z
    lift y to ℕ using (by linarith)
    have : y = 1 := by
      have : y ∣ 4 * k + 1 := ⟨4 * x + y, by rw [mul_add, ← hS]; norm_cast; ring⟩
      rcases (Nat.dvd_prime (Fact.out)).mp this with rfl | rfl
      · rfl
      · rw [← Int.ofNat_inj] at hS; norm_cast at hS; nlinarith [k_pos k]
    subst y
    have : x = k := by linarith [hS]
    subst x
    simp
  · rintro rfl
    simp; ring

rcases t with ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hU⟩
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq] at ht
    have : z = y := by linarith [ht]
    subst this
    have h : y * (4 * x + y) = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← hS.1]; ring
    lift y to ℕ using hS.2.2.le
    lift x to ℕ using hS.2.1.le
    norm_cast at h
    rcases hk.out.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd y ⟨_, h.symm⟩ with rfl | rfl
    · simp at h
      have : x = k := by linarith
      subst this
      rfl
    · have : 4 * k + 1 > 0 := Nat.Prime.pos hk.out
      linarith
  · rintro rfl
    simp
